description: Use this API to rename one of the files in the Scenario. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariofilerename(sgroup, sfile, snewname)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group that contains the specified file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file whose name is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: snewname
parameters.description: New name to be given to the specified file. (input; no default allowed).
